allow: Bash(/c/Windows/System32/WindowsPowerShell/v1.0/powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''.git'\\'' -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.IsReadOnly = $false }; Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''.git'\\'' -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $acl = Get-Acl $_.FullName; $rule = New-Object System.Security.AccessControl.FileSystemAccessRule\('\\''Everyone'\\'','\\''FullControl'\\'','\\''ContainerInherit,ObjectInherit'\\'','\\''None'\\'','\\''Allow'\\''\); $acl.SetAccessRule\($rule\); Set-Acl $_.FullName $acl }')
